overview: Vital Signs Monitor for Out-Patient Department, Spot-Check, Transport, Ward and other Basic Monitoring
features: 8” color TFT LCD Screen (touch screen optional)
Flexible parameters configuration for different clinical environments
Rechargeable Li-ion Battery (up to 12 hours uninterruptable work)
Big font and font color display setting
Selectable for Adult, Pediatric and Neonatal patients
Wired/Wireless CMS, support HL7 protocol to HIS
notes: ECG, Digital or Masimo SpO2, TEMP, Quick Temp (Ear or Forehead), EtCO2 Analyzer, Barcode Scanner, Thermal Recorder, Touch Screen, Wired/Wireless CMS
